subcodes.first_line: O ye faithful ones, O ye who are attracted, O ye who are near, verily I am within hearing of the verses of guidance which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها المخلصون ایها المنجذبون ایها المقربون انی لفی مسمع من ایات الهدی التی
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual transformation, @call to action, @the power of words; of speech, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
